name: Ciambela with Summer Berry Compote
recipeIngredient: 8 tablespoons cold sweet butter, cut into 1/2-inch dice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine berries, lemon juice, and sugar. Place over medium heat and cook until just boiling, about 5 to 6 minutes. Remove from heat and allow to cool.
3. In a food processor, blend flour, sugar, and baking powder with cold butter until the mixture resembles fine bread crumbs.
4. In a separate bowl, beat egg, almond extract, and milk until smooth. Add the liquid all at once to the food processor and blend 10 to 15 seconds until just forming a ball.
5. Remove dough from the food processor to a well-floured cutting board. Shape the dough into a log about 14 inches long and 1-1/2 inches tall.
6. Grease a cookie sheet with the remaining tablespoon of butter and place the log in a round on the center. Place in the preheated oven and bake for 30 to 35 minutes, until light golden brown.
7. Remove from the oven and allow to cool to room temperature. Cut into slices about 1-inch thick, top with 2 tablespoons of berry compote, and serve.
Yield: 4 servings
